repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #94000 in place. Keep the fix narrow to Feishu drive pagination, correcting the settled TypeScript cast and brace/lint failures in the existing implementation. Preserve @ajwan8998 credit and #93928 attribution.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

Repair the Feishu drive pagination fix from #94000 without broadening the drive surface. The branch should keep `list`/`info` pagination behavior for #93928, while correcting the current TypeScript cast and lint/brace failures in `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts`.

Credit: this carries forward the contributor work from @ajwan8998 in #94000 and the report from #93928.

## Repair notes

- Re-fetch #94000 and current `main` before editing.
- Prefer fixing `extensions/feishu/src/drive.ts` only.
- Do not edit `extensions/feishu/src/drive-schema.ts` unless the fresh compile error proves that schema typing is the minimal corrective surface.
- Address the failed `check-lint`, `check-prod-types`, `check-test-types`, `build-artifacts`, and Feishu extension checks before requesting merge review.

## Verification

- `pnpm test extensions/feishu`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` before any merge recommendation
credit_notes: Preserve source PR credit for @ajwan8998 from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/94000.
If the executor must replace rather than repair the branch, the replacement PR body should name #94000 as the source PR and credit @ajwan8998.
